content: {"question": "What does the existing evidence say about who should NOT follow intermittent fasting \u2014 specifically safety signals and contraindications in pregnant or lactating individuals, adolescents, shift workers, people with eating-disorder history, and adults taking insulin or sulfonylureas \u2014 and how should primary-care clinicians communicate IF's evidence-base uncertainty to laypeople without clinical supervision?", "search_queries": ["intermittent fasting contraindications pregnancy lactation adolescents", "time-restricted eating hypoglycemia insulin sulfonylurea case report", "intermittent fasting eating disorder risk adolescent screening", "shift worker intermittent fasting circadian metabolic evidence", "primary care dietary counseling intermittent fasting patient communication"], "perspective": "Public_Health"}
